def positive_float_equality_controls_branching_on_computed_values():
    rule_id = "float_equality_controls_branching_on_computed_values"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag control flow that depends on exact float equality after computation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
